hypothesis: If non-negativity and sum-to-one physics constraints are integrated into a diffusion model for carbon composite composition design, then it will outperform CVAE and TabDDPM by achieving higher Validityreg and higher Validityfab at the target 3,500 MPa and 1.0 W/mK, with equal or better density/coverage, because constraining the diffusion trajectory to the compositional simplex guides sampling toward the feasible materials manifold.
